title: A Quasar--Companion System Without AGN Outflow at $z \sim 6$: The Case of PSO J083+11
summary: PSO J083.8371+11.8482, a quasar at $z = 6.34$ with a nearby companion galaxy, provides an opportunity to study the impact of active galactic nucleus (AGN) activity on the surrounding environment during the epoch of reionization. We analyze ALMA observations of the [C\,\textsc{ii}] 158~$μ$m emission line and the far-infrared (FIR) continuum, which trace cold interstellar gas and dust-reprocessed radiation from star formation and AGN heating. The quasar host shows star formation rates (SFRs) of $544$--$3764~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$ from [C\,\textsc{ii}] and $1861$--$2932~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$ from FIR emission, while the companion galaxy exhibits lower SFRs of $21$--$145$ and $76$--$211~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$ from the same diagnostics. Both galaxies follow typical $L_{\mathrm{[C\,II]}}/L_{\mathrm{FIR}}$ ratios observed in star-forming galaxies and show no evidence for a [C\,\textsc{ii}] deficit, indicating that stellar heating dominates the interstellar medium energetics. The [C\,\textsc{ii}] moment maps reveal compact emission with centrally peaked intensity and ordered rotational kinematics in both systems. Velocity dispersions remain well below values associated with powerful AGN-driven outflows, and no significant morphological asymmetries or disturbed velocity fields indicative of AGN feedback or major mergers are detected, although marginal kinematic substructure in the quasar's high-velocity channels warrants further investigation. Although the companion lies at a projected distance of $18.248 \pm 0.277$~kpc within the quasar proximity zone, neither morphological nor kinematic signatures indicate AGN-driven outflows affecting the circumgalactic medium. We therefore interpret this system as being observed in a pre-outflow accretion phase, where rapid supermassive black hole growth precedes the development of large-scale AGN feedback.

AI.tldr: 对红移6.34的类星体PSO J083.8371+11.8482及其伴星系进行ALMA观测，发现两者均无AGN反馈迹象，表明系统处于AGN大规模反馈发展前的吸积阶段。
AI.motivation: 研究再电离时期AGN活动对周围环境的影响，特别是类星体与其伴星系的相互作用。
AI.method: 利用ALMA观测[C II] 158μm发射线和远红外连续谱，分析冷星际气体、恒星形成和AGN加热的辐射特征。
AI.result: 主星系SFR为544-3764 M☉/yr（[C II]）和1861-2932 M☉/yr（FIR），伴星系SFR较低，两者均遵循典型L[C II]/LFIR比值，无[C II]缺失；速度弥散远低于AGN驱动外流水平，未发现显著形态不对称或扰动速度场。
AI.conclusion: 该系统处于吸积阶段，快速黑洞增长在大规模AGN反馈之前发生。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究z~6类星体及其伴星系，利用ALMA [C II]和远红外连续谱观测分析冷气体、恒星形成和AGN反馈，与用户Zotero画像中的高红移星系、星际介质、恒星形成、ALMA观测等主题高度吻合。论文聚焦于高红移星系动力学和气体性质，属于用户优先关注领域。虽未直接涉及强引力透镜，但高红移星系物理是核心兴趣。无核心作者匹配，但方法（ALMA成像、动力学分析）与用户画像一致。
recommendation.topic_fit: 高红移星系、星际介质、恒星形成、AGN反馈、ALMA观测
recommendation.method_fit: ALMA [C II]和远红外连续谱成像、动力学分析、SFR估算

artifacts.abstract_zh: PSO J083.8371+11.8482，一个红移 $z = 6.34$ 的类星体，其附近有一个伴星系，为研究再电离时期活动星系核（AGN）活动对周围环境的影响提供了机会。我们分析了 [C\,\textsc{ii}] 158~$μ$m 发射线和远红外（FIR）连续谱的 ALMA 观测数据，这些数据追踪了冷星际介质以及来自恒星形成和 AGN 加热的尘埃再处理辐射。类星体宿主星系的恒星形成率（SFR）根据 [C\,\textsc{ii}] 为 $544$--$3764~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$，根据 FIR 发射为 $1861$--$2932~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$，而伴星系根据相同的诊断方法，其 SFR 较低，分别为 $21$--$145$ 和 $76$--$211~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$。两个星系都遵循在恒星形成星系中观测到的典型 $L_{\mathrm{[C\,II]}}/L_{\mathrm{FIR}}$ 比值，并且没有显示出 [C\,\textsc{ii}] 缺失的证据，表明恒星加热主导了星际介质的能量学。[C\,\textsc{ii}] 矩图揭示了两个系统中具有中心峰值强度和有序旋转运动学的致密发射。速度弥散度远低于与强大 AGN 驱动外流相关的值，并且未检测到表明 AGN 反馈或重大并合的显著形态不对称性或扰动速度场，尽管类星体高速通道中的边缘运动学子结构值得进一步研究。尽管该伴星系位于类星体邻近区域内，投影距离为 $18.248 \pm 0.277$~kpc，但形态和运动学特征均未表明 AGN 驱动外流影响了星系周介质。因此，我们将该系统解释为处于外流前吸积阶段，其中超大质量黑洞的快速增长先于大规模 AGN 反馈的发展。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该系统处于吸积阶段，快速黑洞增长在大规模AGN反馈之前发生。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectral fitting results for PSO J083+11 and its companion galaxy. (Upper left panel) [C ii ] 158 \(\mu\) m emission line spectrum of the quasar, with observed data (black points with error bars) and best-fit Gaussian profile (red curve). (Lower left panel) [C ii ] spectrum of the companion galaxy with the same representation. (Upper right panel) FIR spectral energy distribution of the quasar, showing observational data (blue points), the FIR wavelength integration range (green line), and Total-Infrared contribution (red dashed line). (Lower right panel) FIR spectral energy distribution of the companion galaxy with identical notation.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1: PSO J083+11 及其伴星系的光谱拟合结果。(左上图) 类星体的 [C ii ] 158 \(\mu\) m 发射线光谱，显示观测数据（带误差棒的黑点）和最佳拟合高斯轮廓（红色曲线）。(左下图) 伴星系的 [C ii ] 光谱，表示方式相同。(右上图) 类星体的 FIR 光谱能量分布，显示观测数据（蓝点）、FIR 波长积分范围（绿线）和总红外贡献（红色虚线）。(右下图) 伴星系的 FIR 光谱能量分布，符号相同。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of FIR and [C II] Fitting Results for the Quasar and Companion Galaxy
figures.caption_zh: 表 1: 类星体和伴星系的 FIR 和 [C II] 拟合结果汇总

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Dual diagnostic for [C ii ] deficit evaluation. (Left panel) \(L_{\text{[C\,II]}}/L_{\text{FIR}}\) versus FIR luminosity. (Right panel) \(L_{\text{[C\,II]}}/L_{\text{FIR}}\) versus FIR surface brightness \(\Sigma_{\text{FIR}}\) , with theoretical models from Lutz et al. ( 2016 ) (solid line, derived from local star-forming galaxies and local quasars) and Díaz-Santos et al. ( 2017 ) (dashed line, derived from local ULIRGs and PDR simulations). The comparison sample is detailed in Table LABEL:tab:galaxy_sample_extended .
figures.caption_zh: 图 2: [C ii ] 缺失评估的双重诊断。(左图) \(L_{\text{[C\,II]}}/L_{\text{FIR}}\) 与 FIR 光度关系图。(右图) \(L_{\text{[C\,II]}}/L_{\text{FIR}}\) 与 FIR 面亮度 \(\Sigma_{\text{FIR}}\) 关系图，并叠加了来自 Lutz 等人 (2016)（实线，源自局部恒星形成星系和局部类星体）和 Díaz-Santos 等人 (2017)（虚线，源自局部 ULIRG 和 PDR 模拟）的理论模型。比较样本详见表格 LABEL:tab:galaxy_sample_extended。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Correlation between [C ii ] and FIR luminosities for the sample in Table LABEL:tab:galaxy_sample_extended . The dashed line shows the best-fit relation with 1 \(\sigma\) dispersion (gray band). PSO J083+11 (large red circle) and its companion (large blue circle) lie within this scatter, consistent with normal star-forming galaxy behavior. The right axis indicates SFR derived from [C ii ] luminosity using the De Looze et al. ( 2014 ) calibration.
figures.caption_zh: 图 3: 表格 LABEL:tab:galaxy_sample_extended 中样本的 [C ii ] 与 FIR 光度之间的相关性。虚线显示了最佳拟合关系，并附有 1 \(\sigma\) 弥散度（灰色带）。PSO J083+11（大红圈）及其伴星系（大蓝圈）位于此弥散范围内，与正常恒星形成星系的行为一致。右轴表示使用 De Looze 等人 (2014) 校准从 [C ii ] 光度推导出的 SFR。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Quasar moment maps, each covering an area of \(3\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}312\times 3\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}312\) centered at \(\alpha=83.83700^{\circ}\) and \(\delta=11.84830^{\circ}\) . (Left Panel) Quasar intensity map (moment 0). The lower left corner shows the beam size, and the lower right corner shows the scale conversion from \(1^{\prime\prime}\) to kpc. The contour lines represent intensity levels [4, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 40] \(\times~\sigma\) , measured from the outer region towards the center of the quasar. Here, \(\sigma\) is the standard deviation of the background intensity calculated by excluding values above 3 \(\sigma\) , resulting in \(\sigma=0.0465\) Jy beam -1 km s -1 . (Middle Panel) Velocity map (moment 1) of the quasar with maximum and minimum velocities of 124.982 and -155.836 km s -1 . The contours depict regions with different line-of-sight velocities, with numerical labels on the contours indicating the corresponding velocity values in km s -1 . (Right Panel) Velocity dispersion map (moment 2) of the quasar with maximum and minimum values of 190.066 and 4.836 km s -1 . The spatial range and resolution of this panel are identical to the intensity and velocity maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图 4: 类星体矩图，每个图覆盖面积为 \(3\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}312\times 3\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}312\)，中心位于 \(\alpha=83.83700^{\circ}\) 和 \(\delta=11.84830^{\circ}\)。(左图) 类星体强度图（矩 0）。左下角显示波束大小，右下角显示从 \(1^{\prime\prime}\) 到 kpc 的尺度转换。等高线表示强度水平 [4, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 40] \(\times~\sigma\)，从类星体外部区域向中心测量。此处，\(\sigma\) 是通过排除高于 3 \(\sigma\) 的值计算出的背景强度标准差，结果为 \(\sigma=0.0465\) Jy beam -1 km s -1。(中图) 类星体的速度图（矩 1），最大和最小速度分别为 124.982 和 -155.836 km s -1。等高线描绘了具有不同视线速度的区域，等高线上的数字标签表示相应的速度值，单位为 km s -1。(右图) 类星体的速度弥散度图（矩 2），最大和最小值分别为 190.066 和 4.836 km s -1。该图的空间范围和分辨率与强度图和速度图相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Moment maps of the companion galaxy, each covering an area of \(2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}7\times 2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}7\) centered at \(\alpha=83.8373^{\circ}\) and \(\delta=11.8474^{\circ}\) . (Left panel) The intensity (moment 0) map of the companion galaxy. The contours represent intensity levels [2, 3, 4, 5, 6] \(\times~\sigma\) . Here, \(\sigma\) is the standard deviation of the background intensity calculated by excluding pixels with intensities above 2 \(\sigma\) , resulting in \(\sigma=0.04099\) Jy beam -1 km s -1 . (Middle Panel) The velocity (moment 1) map of the companion galaxy with maximum and minimum velocities of 279.511 and -321.217 km s -1 . The contours indicate regions with different line-of-sight velocities, and the numerical values on the contours represent the corresponding velocities in km s -1 . (Right Panel) The velocity dispersion (moment 2) map of the companion galaxy with maximum and minimum values of 303.939 and 12.059 km s -1 . The spatial extent and resolution of this panel are consistent with those of the intensity and velocity maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图 5: 伴星系的矩图，每个图覆盖面积为 \(2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}7\times 2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}7\)，中心位于 \(\alpha=83.8373^{\circ}\) 和 \(\delta=11.8474^{\circ}\)。(左图) 伴星系的强度（矩 0）图。等高线表示强度水平 [2, 3, 4, 5, 6] \(\times~\sigma\)。此处，\(\sigma\) 是通过排除强度高于 2 \(\sigma\) 的像素计算出的背景强度标准差，结果为 \(\sigma=0.04099\) Jy beam -1 km s -1。(中图) 伴星系的速度（矩 1）图，最大和最小速度分别为 279.511 和 -321.217 km s -1。等高线指示具有不同视线速度的区域，等高线上的数值表示相应的速度，单位为 km s -1。(右图) 伴星系的速度弥散度（矩 2）图，最大和最小值分别为 303.939 和 12.059 km s -1。该图的空间范围和分辨率与强度图和速度图一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Combined moment maps of the quasar and its companion galaxy. All panels cover an area of \(7\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}336\times 7\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}336\) . (Upper left panel) Combined intensity (moment 0) map. The contours and \(\sigma\) value for the quasar are the same as in Figure 4 , while the companion galaxy uses the same parameters as in Figure 5 . The arrow indicates a region of the companion galaxy that is likely influenced by AGN feedback. (Upper right panel) Combined velocity (moment 1) map with maximum and minimum values of 124.982 and -159.490 km s -1 . For the quasar, pixels with intensities below 3 \(\sigma\) (using the \(\sigma\) from Figure 4 ) are excluded. For the companion galaxy, a threshold of 2 \(\sigma\) is applied based on the \(\sigma\) value from Figure 5 . (Lower Panel) Combined velocity dispersion (moment 2) map with maximum and minimum values of 241.134 and 6.160 km s -1 , with the same spatial scale and resolution as upper panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图 6: 类星体及其伴星系的组合矩图。所有图覆盖面积为 \(7\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}336\times 7\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}336\)。(左上图) 组合强度（矩 0）图。类星体的等高线和 \(\sigma\) 值与图 4 相同，而伴星系使用与图 5 相同的参数。箭头指示伴星系中可能受 AGN 反馈影响的区域。(右上图) 组合速度（矩 1）图，最大和最小值分别为 124.982 和 -159.490 km s -1。对于类星体，排除强度低于 3 \(\sigma\)（使用图 4 中的 \(\sigma\)）的像素。对于伴星系，基于图 5 中的 \(\sigma\) 值应用 2 \(\sigma\) 阈值。(下图) 组合速度弥散度（矩 2）图，最大和最小值分别为 241.134 和 6.160 km s -1，空间尺度和分辨率与上图相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The quasar’s moment channel map spans \(4\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}032\times 4\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}032\) , constructed from 50 km s -1 velocity channels. The value shown at the top of each channel is given in units of km s -1 . Contours are drawn at \([3,6,9,12,15,18,21,24,27,30]\times\sigma\) , where \(\sigma\) varies per channel with values ranging from \(0.0057\) to \(0.0128\) Jy beam -1 km s -1 (mean \(\sigma=0.0083\) Jy beam -1 km s -1 ). The central two rows (rows 2 and 3) highlight the dominant kinematic features and spatial morphology. The velocity channel at \(200\) – \(150\) km s -1 exhibits a pronounced double-peak structure exceeding 6 \(\sigma\) contours, indicating tidal features and merger signatures from ongoing dynamical interaction. (Right panel) The companion galaxy’s moment channel map covers a smaller area of \(2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}657\times 2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}700\) , constructed with the same 50 km s -1 velocity channel resolution as the quasar. Contours are plotted at \([2,3,4,5,6]\times\sigma\) , with \(\sigma\) ranging from \(0.0072\) to \(0.0131\) Jy beam -1 km s -1 (mean \(\sigma=0.0096\) Jy beam -1 km s -1 ). The single middle row captures the kinematic signature, revealing a more compact and organized gas structure.
figures.caption_zh: 图 7: 类星体的矩通道图覆盖 \(4\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}032\times 4\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}032\)，由 50 km s -1 速度通道构建。每个通道顶部显示的值以 km s -1 为单位。等高线绘制在 \([3,6,9,12,15,18,21,24,27,30]\times\sigma\) 处，其中 \(\sigma\) 随通道变化，取值范围从 \(0.0057\) 到 \(0.0128\) Jy beam -1 km s -1（平均 \(\sigma=0.0083\) Jy beam -1 km s -1）。中间两行（第 2 行和第 3 行）突出了主要的运动学特征和空间形态。速度通道在 \(200\) – \(150\) km s -1 处显示出明显的双峰结构，超过 6 \(\sigma\) 等高线，表明存在来自持续动力学相互作用的潮汐特征和并合迹象。(右图) 伴星系的矩通道图覆盖较小的区域 \(2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}657\times 2\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}700\)，使用与类星体相同的 50 km s -1 速度通道分辨率构建。等高线绘制在 \([2,3,4,5,6]\times\sigma\) 处，\(\sigma\) 取值范围从 \(0.0072\) 到 \(0.0131\) Jy beam -1 km s -1（平均 \(\sigma=0.0096\) Jy beam -1 km s -1）。中间单行捕捉了运动学特征，揭示了一个更致密、更有组织的气体结构。

title: MUSE-DARK III: The evolution of the radial acceleration relation at intermediate redshifts
summary: The radial acceleration relation (RAR) is a tight empirical correlation between the observed radial acceleration (a_tot) and the baryonic radial acceleration (a_bar) measured across galaxy radii: these two accelerations start to deviate significantly from each other below a characteristic acceleration scale, a0. So far, observational studies of the RAR have predominantly focused on galaxies in the local Universe, leaving its evolution with cosmic time largely unexplored. Using high signal-to-noise data from the MUSE Hubble Ultra Deep Field survey, we investigate the RAR with a sample of 79 star-forming galaxies (complete above M* >10^8.8 Msun) at intermediate redshifts (0.33 <z <1.44). We estimate the observed intrinsic acceleration and the baryonic acceleration from a disk-halo decomposition that incorporates stellar, gas, and dark matter components, with corrections for pressure support, using 3D forward modelling. We find a RAR in our intermediate-z sample offset from the local relation, with a higher characteristic acceleration scale, a0(z~1) = 2.38+/-0.1* 10^-10 m/s^2, and a larger intrinsic scatter (~0.17 dex). Dividing the sample into redshift bins and refitting the RAR in each bin, we find a characteristic acceleration scale that systematically increases with z. Parametrizing the z-dependence as a0(z)= a0(0) + a1 * z, we obtain a1 = 1.59+/-0.1 *10^-10 m/s^2, providing evidence for a z-evolution. We find similar results using various dark matter halo profiles as well as the Modified Newtonian Dynamics framework in our 3D forward modelling. Our results show that the RAR persists at intermediate redshift, with statistically significant redshift evolution of the characteristic acceleration, pointing to a possible evolution of the baryon-missing mass connection over cosmic time.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用MUSE Hubble超深场数据，对79个中等红移（z=0.33-1.44）的恒星形成星系进行径向加速度关系（RAR）分析，发现RAR在中等红移仍然成立，但特征加速度尺度a0随红移系统性地增加（a1=1.59±0.1×10^-10 m/s²），表明重子-缺失质量之间的联系可能随宇宙时间演化。
AI.motivation: 此前RAR研究主要集中于本地宇宙星系，其在宇宙时间尺度上的演化尚未被充分探索。本研究旨在探究中等红移星系中RAR是否仍然成立，以及特征加速度尺度是否随红移演化。
AI.method: 利用MUSE Hubble超深场高信噪比数据，选取79个恒星形成星系（M*>10^8.8 Msun，0.33<z<1.44）。通过3D正向建模，结合恒星、气体和暗物质成分进行盘-晕分解，并修正压力支撑，估算观测固有加速度和重子加速度。将样本分为红移区间重新拟合RAR，并参数化红移依赖关系。
AI.result: 中等红移样本的RAR相对于本地关系存在偏移，特征加速度更大（a0(z~1)=2.38±0.1×10^-10 m/s²），固有散射更大（~0.17 dex）。特征加速度尺度随红移系统性增加，参数化为a0(z)=a0(0)+a1*z，得到a1=1.59±0.1×10^-10 m/s²。
AI.conclusion: RAR在中等红移依然存在，但特征加速度存在统计上显著的红移演化，表明重子-缺失质量之间的联系可能随宇宙时间发生演化。不同暗物质晕轮廓和MOND框架下均得到相似结果。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究中等红移星系的径向加速度关系（RAR），涉及暗物质和恒星形成星系，与Zotero画像中的'dark matter'和'star-forming galaxies'关键词部分匹配。然而，论文核心是星系动力学和暗物质分布，而非用户主要兴趣的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移多相气体。用户画像中'cosmic noon'、'dense gas'、'lens'等高频关键词未在论文中体现，且无核心作者匹配。因此，相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配：涉及暗物质和恒星形成星系，但未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移多相气体等核心主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：使用MUSE光谱数据和3D正向建模进行盘-晕分解，而非引力透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配：作者列表中无Zotero核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：首次在中等红移系统研究RAR演化，但方法非用户兴趣领域。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题偏离用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学），且未涉及高红移多相气体或偏振等优先主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 径向加速度关系（RAR）是观测到的径向加速度（a_tot）与重子径向加速度（a_bar）在星系半径范围内的一种紧密经验相关性：这两种加速度在低于特征加速度尺度a0时开始显著偏离。迄今为止，对RAR的观测研究主要集中在本地宇宙的星系上，其在宇宙时间上的演化在很大程度上尚未被探索。利用MUSE哈勃超深场巡天的高信噪比数据，我们研究了中等红移（0.33 < z < 1.44）下79个恒星形成星系（在M* > 10^8.8 Msun以上完备）样本的RAR。我们通过盘-晕分解来估计观测到的本征加速度和重子加速度，该分解结合了恒星、气体和暗物质成分，并利用三维正向建模对压力支撑进行了修正。我们发现，中等红移样本中的RAR相对于本地关系存在偏移，具有更高的特征加速度尺度a0(z~1) = 2.38+/-0.1* 10^-10 m/s^2，以及更大的本征弥散（约0.17 dex）。将样本按红移区间划分并在每个区间内重新拟合RAR，我们发现特征加速度尺度随z系统性增加。将z依赖性参数化为a0(z)= a0(0) + a1 * z，我们得到a1 = 1.59+/-0.1 *10^-10 m/s^2，为z演化提供了证据。我们在三维正向建模中使用各种暗物质晕轮廓以及修正牛顿动力学框架得到了类似的结果。我们的结果表明，RAR在中等红移时仍然存在，且特征加速度具有统计上显著的红移演化，这表明重子-缺失质量之间的联系可能随宇宙时间发生演化。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，RAR在中等红移依然存在，但特征加速度存在统计上显著的红移演化，表明重子-缺失质量之间的联系可能随宇宙时间发生演化。不同暗物质晕轮廓和MOND框架下均得到相似结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: RAR for the MHUDF sample. The purple curve shows the best-fit RAR at \(0.33 1 , while the red and green curves show the rar relation at \(z=0\) and the Varasteanu relation at \(z<0.08\) , respectively. The black dotted line indicates the 1:1 relation. The histogram inset displays the residuals with respect to our fit. The cross in the upper left corner indicates the mean \(1\sigma\) uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：MHUDF样本的RAR。紫色曲线显示了在\(0.33<z<1.44\)范围内的最佳拟合RAR，而红色和绿色曲线分别显示了在\(z=0\)处的RAR关系和\(z<0.08\)处的Varasteanu关系。黑色虚线表示1:1关系。直方图插图中显示了相对于我们拟合的残差。左上角的十字表示平均\(1\sigma\)不确定度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Best-fit \(a_{0}\) values obtained by fitting Eq. 1 on the full sample, using the resolved RAR tracks derived under different modelling assumptions. The purple data point shows \(a_{0}|{z\sim 1}\) obtained using the DC14 halo profile applied uniformly to the full sample (Sect. 3.1 ). The cyan point shows \(a_{0}|{z\sim 1}\) derived from a galaxy-by-galaxy best-fitting \(\Lambda\) CDM model, where each galaxy is assigned the DM profile that maximises its Bayesian evidence (Appendix D ). The blue point shows \(a_{0}|{z\sim 1}\) recovered from the MOND-based framework (Appendix E ). The red star indicates the fiducial \(a_{0}|{z\sim 0}\) from rar , while the green star shows the result from Varasteanu .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：通过在不同建模假设下推导的解析RAR轨迹，对完整样本拟合方程1得到的最佳拟合\(a_{0}\)值。紫色数据点显示了使用统一应用于完整样本的DC14晕轮廓（第3.1节）得到的\(a_{0}|_{z\sim 1}\)。青色点显示了从逐个星系最佳拟合\(\Lambda\)CDM模型推导出的\(a_{0}|_{z\sim 1}\)，其中每个星系被分配了最大化其贝叶斯证据的暗物质轮廓（附录D）。蓝色点显示了基于MOND框架（附录E）恢复的\(a_{0}|_{z\sim 1}\)。红色星标表示来自RAR的基准\(a_{0}|_{z\sim 0}\)，而绿色星标显示了Varasteanu的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Redshift evolution of the characteristic acceleration scale. In each quantile-based \(z\) bin (blue bars), we fit the RAR with Eq. 1 to derive \(a_{0}\) , with uncertainties shown as grey error bars. The star marks the SPARC \(z=0\) value. The purple line shows the predicted evolution, using the best-fitting parameters from the global, \(z\) -dependent fit to the RAR for the full sample (i.e using Eq. 1 where \(a_{0}\) was substituted with Eq. 3 , - see Eq. 4 ). The red line shows the same, but when including SPARC in the fit. The coloured shaded region shows the 1 \(\sigma\) errors for the fits.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：特征加速度尺度的红移演化。在每个基于分位数的\(z\)区间（蓝色条）中，我们用方程1拟合RAR以推导\(a_{0}\)，不确定度以灰色误差条显示。星标表示SPARC的\(z=0\)值。紫色线显示了使用完整样本的全局、\(z\)依赖RAR拟合的最佳拟合参数预测的演化（即使用方程1，其中\(a_{0}\)被方程3替代——见方程4）。红线显示了相同情况，但将SPARC纳入拟合。彩色阴影区域显示了拟合的1\(\sigma\)误差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Stellar masses versus redshift for all MHUDF SFGs. The black dashed line indicates the mass completeness limit of the survey, which is reasonably complete for \(0.2 Paper I . Grey points show all SFGs observed in the MHUDF survey, red-outlined points correspond to the galaxies analysed in Paper I , and blue points indicate the galaxies studied in this work. The histograms on the top and right display the redshift and stellar-mass distributions, respectively, colour-coded to match the main panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：所有MHUDF恒星形成星系（SFGs）的恒星质量与红移的关系。黑色虚线表示巡天的质量完备极限，对于\(0.2<z<1.5\)的星系，该极限是合理完备的（论文I）。灰色点显示了MHUDF巡天中观测到的所有SFGs，红色轮廓点对应于论文I中分析的星系，蓝色点表示本工作中研究的星系。顶部和右侧的直方图分别显示了红移和恒星质量分布，颜色编码与主面板匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Examples of the 3D disk-halo decomposition for the two galaxies from the sample. The solid black line represents the circular velocity \(v_{{c}}(r)\) corrected for pressure support. The green curve represents the RC of the DM component. The solid orange and blue curves represent the disk and cold gas components, respectively. The light shaded regions show the 95% confidence intervals. The dotted brown line represents the stellar component obtained using the Multi-Gaussian Expansion modelling of resolved stellar mass maps obtained from pixel-by-pixel SED fitting, while the dashed-dotted green curve shows the DM component obtained independently from a 1D disk-halo decomposition. All velocities are intrinsic, i.e. corrected for inclination and instrumental effects, including seeing (PSF). The black dotted line shows the physical extent of a MUSE spaxel.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：样本中两个星系的三维盘-晕分解示例。黑色实线表示经压力支撑修正后的圆周速度\(v_{{c}}(r)\)。绿色曲线表示暗物质成分的旋转曲线。橙色和蓝色实线分别表示盘和冷气体成分。浅色阴影区域显示了95%置信区间。棕色虚线表示通过逐像素SED拟合获得的解析恒星质量图的Multi-Gaussian Expansion建模得到的恒星成分，而绿色点划线表示独立于一维盘-晕分解得到的暗物质成分。所有速度都是本征的，即经过倾角和仪器效应（包括视宁度（PSF））修正。黑色虚线显示了MUSE空间像素的物理范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left: Average mass-to-light ratios (M/L) in the K-band as a function of redshift for the MHUDF sample split into two- \(M_{\star}\) bins (low- \(M_{\star}\) bin-yellow, high- \(M_{\star}\) bin-orange), along with the evolution inferred for a sample of more than 5000 K-selected galaxies in Drory et al. ( 2004 ) . The red star shows the M/L-K ratio adopted for the SPARC sample. Right: Impact of systematic disk mass offsets on the inferred \(a_{0}(z)\) . The black points correspond to the fiducial fits shown in Fig 3 . The blue points show the inferred \(a_{0}(z)\) assuming a global shift of \(+0.2\) dex in the mass budget of the sample, while the green points show the same, but when assuming a global shift of \(+0.45\) dex . The red star and dotted lines show the canonical \(a_{0}(z=0)\) inferred for the SPARC sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左图：MHUDF样本按两个\(M_{\star}\)区间（低\(M_{\star}\)区间-黄色，高\(M_{\star}\)区间-橙色）划分的K波段平均质光比（M/L）随红移的变化，以及Drory等人（2004）对超过5000个K选择星系样本推断的演化。红色星标显示了SPARC样本采用的M/L-K比值。右图：系统性盘质量偏移对推断的\(a_{0}(z)\)的影响。黑点对应于图3中显示的基准拟合。蓝点显示了假设样本质量预算全局偏移\(+0.2\) dex时推断的\(a_{0}(z)\)，而绿点显示了相同情况但假设全局偏移\(+0.45\) dex。红色星标和虚线显示了为SPARC样本推断的规范\(a_{0}(z=0)\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: RAR of our intermediate- \(z\) sample, with \(a_{bar}\) and \(a_{tot}\) derived from the model RCs corresponding to each galaxy’s best-fitting \(\Lambda\) CDM halo profile. Colored points indicate the halo profile used in the disk–halo decomposition. The cross in the lower right corner indicates the mean \(1\sigma\) uncertainties on the data points. The dotted black line shows the 1:1 relation. The purple curve represents the best-fit RAR, with \(a_{0}|_{z\sim 1}=2.61^{+0.13}_{-0.09}\times 10^{-10}\penalty 10000\ {m/s^{2}}\) (i.e. as in Fig. 1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：我们的中等\(z\)样本的RAR，其中\(a_{bar}\)和\(a_{tot}\)来自对应于每个星系最佳拟合\(\Lambda\)CDM晕轮廓的模型旋转曲线。彩色点表示盘-晕分解中使用的晕轮廓。右下角的十字表示数据点的平均\(1\sigma\)不确定度。黑色虚线表示1:1关系。紫色曲线表示最佳拟合RAR，其中\(a_{0}|_{z\sim 1}=2.61^{+0.13}_{-0.09}\times 10^{-10}\penalty 10000\ {m/s^{2}}\)（即如图1所示）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Distribution of the MOND acceleration parameter \(a_{1}\) . The purple histogram shows the recovered \(a_{1}\) values from individual galaxy fits. The vertical red line marks the reference value obtained from the RAR in the main text, \(a_{1}=(1.59^{+0.11}_{-0.10})\times 10^{-10}\penalty 10000\ {m/s^{2}}\) , using the DC14 framework (Eq. 4 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图8：MOND加速度参数\(a_{1}\)的分布。紫色直方图显示了从单个星系拟合中恢复的\(a_{1}\)值。垂直红线标记了从正文RAR中获得的参考值，即使用DC14框架（方程4）得到的\(a_{1}=(1.59^{+0.11}_{-0.10})\times 10^{-10}\penalty 10000\ {m/s^{2}}\)。

title: Backlighting the Cosmic Web with Fast Radio Bursts: An Anthology of Dispersion Measure Cross-Correlations with Large-Scale Structure and Baryon Tracers
summary: Fast Radio Bursts (FRBs) probe baryons permeating the cosmic web through their dispersion measures (DMs), which encode the integrated electron density along cosmological sightlines. Using 3,455 unique FRB sources from CHIME/FRB with $\sim 15$ arcmin localizations, we present an anthology of DM correlations with tracers of large-scale structure and baryonic matter at redshifts $z \lesssim 1.5$. We measure statistically significant correlations at $2.6-5σ$ with ten probes, including galaxies ($2.8σ$), weak gravitational lensing ($2.6σ$), cosmic infrared background ($4.0σ$), cosmic microwave background (CMB) lensing ($3.3σ$), thermal Sunyaev Zel'dovich (tSZ) effect ($3.8σ$), X-ray emission tracing galaxy clusters ($5.0σ$) and superclusters ($3.3σ$), soft X-ray background (SXRB, $4.1σ$), and radio continuum emission ($3.2σ$). These measurements reveal a consistent picture in which FRB sightlines intersecting overdense environments carry systematically larger DMs. Correlations with hot-gas tracers provide additional leverage on the strength of feedback, as they are strongly weighted towards the dense, bound gas. The measured amplitude of tSZ$\times$DM and SXRB$\times$DM correlations are consistent with theoretical predictions of baryon distribution from a DM-$z$ relation-inferred model with moderate feedback at $\sim 0.5σ$ level. Weaker feedback scenario is ruled out at $\sim 3.5σ$ by the SXRB$\times$DM correlation. Taken together, these measurements constitute a quantitative multi-tracer foundation for a new era in which FRBs from next generation facilities, such as BURSTT, CHORD, DSA, and SKA, in harmony with other probes, will map the baryon content of the full extent of the cosmic web.

AI.tldr: 本文利用CHIME/FRB的3,455个FRB源，通过色散测量(DM)与10种宇宙结构示踪物的交叉关联分析（2.6-5σ显著性），揭示了FRB视线穿越高密度区域时DM系统性增大的规律，并利用热气体示踪物排除了弱反馈模型（3.5σ），为未来多信使探测宇宙重子分布奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: FRB的色散测量(DM)可以探测宇宙网中的重子分布，但此前缺乏大规模统计样本的系统性多示踪物关联研究，本文旨在利用大量FRB源建立与多种大尺度结构示踪物的定量关联，以揭示重子分布和反馈效应。
AI.method: 使用CHIME/FRB的3,455个独特FRB源（约15角分定位），在红移z<1.5范围内，测量DM与10种示踪物（星系、弱引力透镜、宇宙红外背景、CMB透镜、tSZ效应、X射线星系团和超星系团、软X射线背景、射电连续谱）的统计相关性，并与理论模型对比。
AI.result: 10种示踪物均显示出与DM的统计显著相关（2.6-5σ），其中星系团X射线发射(5.0σ)、软X射线背景(4.1σ)、宇宙红外背景(4.0σ)和tSZ效应(3.8σ)最为显著。关联幅度与中等反馈模型在~0.5σ水平一致，弱反馈模型被SXRB×DM关联在~3.5σ水平排除。
AI.conclusion: 这些测量建立了多示踪物定量基础，证明FRB可有效探测宇宙网重子分布，并约束反馈强度。未来BURSTT、CHORD、DSA、SKA等设施将结合多种探针绘制完整的宇宙网重子分布图。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究快速射电暴（FRB）的色散测量与大尺度结构示踪物的关联，属于宇宙学和大尺度结构领域，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学）无直接关联。虽然提及弱引力透镜（weak gravitational lensing）作为示踪物之一，但并非论文核心，且用户兴趣中强引力透镜是重点，弱引力透镜仅为泛泛提及。论文未涉及高红移星系动力学、多相气体或偏振等用户优先主题，也未包含用户核心作者。因此相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为FRB宇宙学，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法为统计交叉关联分析，非用户常用的引力透镜建模或高分辨率光谱/成像方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文在FRB领域具有创新性，但与用户兴趣领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于纯宇宙学/大尺度结构研究，未涉及用户优先主题（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 快速射电暴（FRB）通过其色散量（DM）探测渗透宇宙网的重子，DM编码了沿宇宙学视线方向的积分电子密度。利用CHIME/FRB的3,455个独特FRB源（定位精度约15角分），我们呈现了DM与红移z≲1.5处大尺度结构和重子物质示踪物的相关性的文集。我们测量了与十种示踪物在2.6-5σ水平上具有统计显著的相关性，包括星系（2.8σ）、弱引力透镜（2.6σ）、宇宙红外背景（4.0σ）、宇宙微波背景（CMB）透镜（3.3σ）、热Sunyaev Zel'dovich（tSZ）效应（3.8σ）、追踪星系团（5.0σ）和超星系团（3.3σ）的X射线发射、软X射线背景（SXRB，4.1σ）以及射电连续谱发射（3.2σ）。这些测量揭示了一致的情景：与过密环境相交的FRB视线方向携带系统性地更大的DM。与热气体示踪物的相关性为反馈强度提供了额外的约束能力，因为它们强烈地加权于致密、束缚的气体。tSZ×DM和SXRB×DM相关性的测量振幅与来自DM-z关系推断模型（中等反馈）的重子分布理论预测在约0.5σ水平上一致。SXRB×DM相关性在约3.5σ水平上排除了弱反馈情景。综合来看，这些测量构成了一个定量的多示踪物基础，为新时代铺平道路——来自下一代设施（如BURSTT、CHORD、DSA和SKA）的FRB将与其他探针协同，绘制整个宇宙网的重子含量图。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，这些测量建立了多示踪物定量基础，证明FRB可有效探测宇宙网重子分布，并约束反馈强度。未来BURSTT、CHORD、DSA、SKA等设施将结合多种探针绘制完整的宇宙网重子分布图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Redshift sensitivity of CHIME/FRB DMs (CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al., 2026 ) , when cross-correlated with LSS and baryon tracers. Each panel shows the normalized DM perturbation weighting function convolved with the redshift kernel of various probes, including DESI LRGs (Zhou et al., 2023a ) , DECADE tangential shear (Gatti et al., 2025 ; Anbajagane et al., 2025a ) , WISE-reconstructed 100 \(\mu\) m CIB (Chiang, 2023 ; Chiang et al., 2025 ) , Planck CMB lensing convergence (Planck Collaboration et al., 2020a ) , LoTSS star-forming galaxies and AGNs (Shimwell et al., 2026 ) , Planck tSZ Compton- \(y\) parameter (Planck Collaboration et al., 2020b ) , RASS (Klein et al., 2023 ) and eRASS1 (Bulbul et al., 2024 ) X-ray galaxy groups, clusters and superclusters, and RASS soft X-ray background (SXRB; Snowden et al., 1997 ; Ferreira et al., 2024 ) . This set of cross-correlations probes the distribution of matter and baryons at redshifts \(z\lesssim 1.5\) , with different tracers preferentially weighting distinct redshift ranges.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：CHIME/FRB DM（CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al., 2026）在与LSS和重子示踪物互相关时的红移灵敏度。每个面板显示了归一化的DM扰动权重函数与各种探针的红移核的卷积，包括DESI LRGs（Zhou et al., 2023a）、DECADE切向剪切（Gatti et al., 2025；Anbajagane et al., 2025a）、WISE重建的100 \(\mu\) m CIB（Chiang, 2023；Chiang et al., 2025）、Planck CMB透镜会聚（Planck Collaboration et al., 2020a）、LoTSS恒星形成星系和AGN（Shimwell et al., 2026）、Planck tSZ Compton-\(y\)参数（Planck Collaboration et al., 2020b）、RASS（Klein et al., 2023）和eRASS1（Bulbul et al., 2024）X射线星系群、团和超星系团，以及RASS软X射线背景（SXRB；Snowden et al., 1997；Ferreira et al., 2024）。这组互相关探测了红移\(z\lesssim 1.5\)处物质和重子的分布，不同的示踪物优先加权不同的红移范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Sky maps in an orthographic projection centered on the north celestial pole, showing the CHIME/FRB sample (CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al., 2026 ) , alongside the ten LSS and baryons tracers cross-correlated in this work. Dashed grid lines mark declinations of 30 ∘ and 60 ∘ , and right ascension intervals of 60 ∘ . Unobserved or masked regions are left blank. All maps are smoothed with a \(1^{\circ}\) FWHM Gaussian for display. Upper panels : CHIME/FRB catalog, with each FRB colored by its NE2001-subtracted DM; the DESI LRG number overdensity ( \(\delta_{g}\) ) (Zhou et al., 2023a ) ; DECADE weak lensing convergence ( \(\kappa\) ) map (Gatti et al., 2025 ; Anbajagane et al., 2025a ) . Lower panels : WISE-reconstructed 100 \(\mu\) m CIB (Chiang, 2023 ) intensity ( \(I_{{CIB}}\) ); Planck PR3 tSZ-deprojected CMB lensing convergence ( \(\kappa_{{CMB}}\) ) (Planck Collaboration et al., 2020a ) ; Planck Compton- \(y\) map (Planck Collaboration et al., 2020b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：以北天极为中心的正交投影天图，显示了CHIME/FRB样本（CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al., 2026），以及本工作中互相关的十种LSS和重子示踪物。虚线网格线标记了30°和60°的赤纬，以及60°的赤经间隔。未观测或掩蔽区域留空。所有地图均使用\(1^{\circ}\) FWHM高斯平滑以显示。上方面板：CHIME/FRB星表，每个FRB按其NE2001减除后的DM着色；DESI LRG数超密度（\(\delta_{g}\)）（Zhou et al., 2023a）；DECADE弱透镜会聚（\(\kappa\)）图（Gatti et al., 2025；Anbajagane et al., 2025a）。下方面板：WISE重建的100 \(\mu\) m CIB（Chiang, 2023）强度（\(I_{{CIB}}\)）；Planck PR3 tSZ减除后的CMB透镜会聚（\(\kappa_{{CMB}}\)）（Planck Collaboration et al., 2020a）；Planck Compton-\(y\)图（Planck Collaboration et al., 2020b）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: (Cont.) Upper panels : RASS (Klein et al., 2023 ) and eRASS1 (Bulbul et al., 2024 ) X-ray galaxy groups and clusters, colored by mass; eRASS1 superclusters at \(z (Liu et al., 2024 ) ; ROSAT soft X-ray background (Snowden et al., 1997 ; Ferreira et al., 2024 ) . Bottom panels : LoTSS radio sky flux density (Shimwell et al., 2026 ) ; LoTSS radio source number overdensity (Shimwell et al., 2026 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：（续）上方面板：RASS（Klein et al., 2023）和eRASS1（Bulbul et al., 2024）X射线星系群和团，按质量着色；eRASS1在\(z (Liu et al., 2024 )\)处的超星系团；ROSAT软X射线背景（Snowden et al., 1997；Ferreira et al., 2024）。下方面板：LoTSS射电天流通量密度（Shimwell et al., 2026）；LoTSS射电源数超密度（Shimwell et al., 2026）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of cross-correlation measurement statistics for each of the ten tracers. The statistic column lists the cross-correlation estimator used for each tracer, where \(\mathcal{D}\) denotes the FRB DM field and superscripts identify the tracer: \(g\) (galaxy number density), \(\gamma\) (tangential shear), \(I_{{CIB}}\) (CIB intensity), \(\kappa_{{CMB}}\) (CMB lensing convergence), \(y\) (Compton- \(y\) parameter), \(c\) (X-ray groups and clusters), \(sc\) (X-ray superclusters), \(C_{X}\) (soft X-ray background), \(S_{\nu}\) (radio flux density), and \(s_{R}\) (radio source number density). \(N_{{FRB}}\) gives the number of FRBs contributing to each measurement for respective DM cuts. The measurement and null SNR is computed from the joint data vectors across all three DM cuts and their jackknife cross-covariance matrix, fully accounting for the covariance between nested DM subsamples.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：十种示踪物中每种互相关测量统计的总结。统计列列出了每种示踪物使用的互相关估计量，其中\(\mathcal{D}\)表示FRB DM场，上标标识示踪物：\(g\)（星系数密度）、\(\gamma\)（切向剪切）、\(I_{{CIB}}\)（CIB强度）、\(\kappa_{{CMB}}\)（CMB透镜会聚）、\(y\)（Compton-\(y\)参数）、\(c\)（X射线群和团）、\(sc\)（X射线超星系团）、\(C_{X}\)（软X射线背景）、\(S_{\nu}\)（射电通量密度）和\(s_{R}\)（射电源数密度）。\(N_{{FRB}}\)给出了对于各自DM截断，对每次测量有贡献的FRB数量。测量和零假设信噪比是根据所有三个DM截断的联合数据向量及其刀切互协方差矩阵计算的，完全考虑了嵌套DM子样本之间的协方差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Correlation functions between CHIME/FRB DMs and each of the ten tracers, measured using treecorr with jackknife covariance estimation over 50 spatial patches. Correlations are measured as a function of projected physical separation \(R\) at \(\gtrsim\) Mpc-scales, or angular separation \(\theta\) at \(\gtrsim\) arcminute/degree-scales, depending on the tracer. Each panel shows results for three DM thresholds, retaining only FRBs with DM \({}_{{ex}}\geq\) DM cut . The measurement significance quoted in each panel is the SNR for each DM cut; joint SNRs across all DM cuts are listed in Table 1 . Where available, theoretical predictions computed using a BCEmu baryonic model are overlaid for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CHIME/FRB DM与十种示踪物中每种之间的相关函数，使用treecorr在50个空间块上进行刀切协方差估计测量。相关性作为投影物理分离\(R\)（在\(\gtrsim\) Mpc尺度）或角分离\(\theta\)（在\(\gtrsim\) 角分/度尺度）的函数进行测量，具体取决于示踪物。每个面板显示了三种DM阈值的结果，仅保留DM\({}_{{ex}}\geq\) DM截断的FRB。每个面板中引用的测量显著性是对每个DM截断的SNR；所有DM截断的联合SNR列于表1。在可用的情况下，使用BCEmu重子模型计算的理论预测作为参考叠加显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Correlation matrices from the jackknife covariance between angular bins for each of the ten correlation functions, computed jointly across the three DM threshold samples. Each matrix element shows the Pearson correlation coefficient \(C_{ij}/\sqrt{C_{ii}C_{jj}}\) . The block structure within each matrix reflects correlations between separation bins at fixed DM cut, while the off-diagonal blocks capture correlations between measurements at different DM thresholds, which arise naturally because higher DM cut samples are nested subsets of lower DM cut samples. The degree of off-diagonal structure varies across tracers, reflecting differences in the underlying angular clustering of each tracer field. Matrices dominated by a clean diagonal (e.g. Planck CMB lensing, LoTSS radio sky) indicate largely uncorrelated bins, while those with significant off-diagonal power (e.g. DESI LRG, DECADE weak lensing) indicate stronger inter-bin correlations that must be accounted for in the joint SNR estimate.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自十种相关函数中每种的角度区间之间刀切协方差的相关矩阵，联合跨三个DM阈值样本计算。每个矩阵元素显示Pearson相关系数\(C_{ij}/\sqrt{C_{ii}C_{jj}}\)。每个矩阵内的块结构反映了在固定DM截断下分离区间之间的相关性，而对角线外的块捕获了不同DM阈值下测量之间的相关性，这自然产生，因为较高DM截断样本是较低DM截断样本的嵌套子集。对角线外结构的程度因示踪物而异，反映了每个示踪物场底层角度聚类的差异。以清晰对角线为主的矩阵（例如Planck CMB透镜、LoTSS射电天空）表示基本不相关的区间，而具有显著对角线外功率的矩阵（例如DESI LRG、DECADE弱透镜）表示必须在联合SNR估计中考虑的更强的区间间相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Amplitude parameter \(\alpha\) fits to the Planck tSZ \(\times\) DM (top panel) and RASS SXRB \(\times\) DM (bottom panel), for three feedback scenarios: weak feedback ( \(\log M_{c}=12\) , pink), strong feedback ( \(\log M_{c}=14\) , blue), and the DM- \(z\) inferred feedback model ( \(\log M_{c}=12.84\) , black). In each panel, dashed curves show the fiducial theory prediction ( \(\alpha=1\) ) and solid curves show the best-fit amplitude-scaled theory curve ( \(\alpha\,\xi_{{th}}\) ), with shaded bands indicating \(1/2\sigma\) uncertainty on \(\alpha\) . For the tSZ measurement, the weak, strong, and DM- \(z\) inferred models yield \(\alpha=1.0\pm 0.3\) , \(1.5\pm 0.6\) , and \(1.0\pm 0.4\) , respectively. For the SXRB measurement, the corresponding values are \(\alpha=0.3\pm 0.2\) , \(7.2\pm 4.2\) , and \(0.8\pm 0.4\) , respectively. The DM- \(z\) inferred model provides a good description of both measurements, while the weak feedback model over-predicts the SXRB signal by \(3.5\sigma\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对Planck tSZ \(\times\) DM（上方面板）和RASS SXRB \(\times\) DM（下方面板）的振幅参数\(\alpha\)拟合，针对三种反馈情景：弱反馈（\(\log M_{c}=12\)，粉色）、强反馈（\(\log M_{c}=14\)，蓝色）和DM-\(z\)推断的反馈模型（\(\log M_{c}=12.84\)，黑色）。在每个面板中，虚线曲线显示了基准理论预测（\(\alpha=1\)），实线曲线显示了最佳拟合振幅缩放的理论曲线（\(\alpha\,\xi_{{th}}\)），阴影带表示\(\alpha\)的\(1/2\sigma\)不确定性。对于tSZ测量，弱、强和DM-\(z\)推断模型分别产生\(\alpha=1.0\pm 0.3\)、\(1.5\pm 0.6\)和\(1.0\pm 0.4\)。对于SXRB测量，相应的值为\(\alpha=0.3\pm 0.2\)、\(7.2\pm 4.2\)和\(0.8\pm 0.4\)。DM-\(z\)推断模型很好地描述了这两个测量，而弱反馈模型以\(3.5\sigma\)高估了SXRB信号。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Null test validation of correlation functions between CHIME/FRB DMs and each of the ten tracers, measured with jackknife covariance estimator over 50 spatial patches. The DMs of FRBs were randomly shuffled to construct the null expectation. Gray points in the background represents measurement from each of the 100 shuffles. The colored points denote their mean, and the uncertainties include the shot noise and the uncertainty on mean estimate.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：CHIME/FRB DM与十种示踪物中每种之间的相关函数的零假设检验验证，使用刀切协方差估计器在50个空间块上测量。FRB的DM被随机打乱以构建零假设期望。背景中的灰色点代表每次100次打乱的测量。彩色点表示它们的平均值，不确定性包括散粒噪声和平均值估计的不确定性。
